ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Serial number of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., CPU, GPU) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the product was released */,
  "process_size_nm" INTEGER /* Process size of the product in nanometers */,
  "tdp_w" INTEGER /* Thermal Design Power (TDP) of the product in watts */,
  "die_size_mm2" REAL /* Die size of the product in square millimeters */,
  "transistors_million" INTEGER /* Number of transistors in the product in millions */,
  "freq_mhz" INTEGER /* Clock frequency of the product in megahertz */,
  "foundry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the foundry where the product was manufactured */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued, in development) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line (e.g., consumer, enterprise) */,
  "marketing_notes" TEXT /* Marketing notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_foundry_id FOREIGN KEY ("foundry_id") REFERENCES foundries ("foundry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foundries" (
  "foundry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foundry */,
  "foundry_name" TEXT /* Name of the foundry */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the foundry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the foundry */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the foundry was established */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total manufacturing capacity of the foundry */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the foundry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foundry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vendor */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the vendor was established */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Detailed patch notes for the version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the version */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information (e.g., supported operating systems) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "use_case" TEXT /* Primary use case of the product type (e.g., gaming, data centers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is enabled by default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is the primary image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product document */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the document belongs to */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_documents_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product relation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "related_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related product */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relation (e.g., successor, predecessor, variant) */,
  "relation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the relationship (e.g., performance improvement, cost reduction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_relations_related_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_relations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
